tagline: Hey, I'm Meiyalaghan — I build full-stack apps and love clean, simple UI/UX.
description: I'm a B.Tech IT student who loves building full-stack apps, designing clean UIs, and figuring out how software breaks so I can fix it.

roles.detailed: Full Stack Web Development | UI/UX Design | Software Testing

bio: Motivated B.Tech Information Technology student with hands-on experience in UI/UX design, full-stack web development, and software testing. Proficient in Java, Python, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, HTML, and CSS. Passionate about developing scalable applications, solving real-world problems through hackathons, and continuously learning new technologies.

bullets: Built Academic DocumentValidator, a secure certificate verification system using hash-based IDs.
Developed an admin dashboard for issuing and validating certificates.
Ensured data integrity with scalable backend integration across React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Python.
experience.desc: Secure certificate verification platform built during Smart India Hackathon 2025.

bullets: Developed Smart Fitness Platform with real-time tracking and AI-driven insights.
Integrated the Fitbit API for live health data and activity tracking.
Added gamification and multilingual support to boost engagement.
experience.desc: AI-assisted fitness tracking platform built during Smart India Hackathon 2024.

bullets: Pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology, maintaining a CGPA of 8/10.
Coursework spans DSA, OOP, DBMS, SDLC, and Software Testing.
Active participant in hackathons, coding contests, and technical workshops.
experience.desc: Ongoing undergraduate degree in Information Technology (2023 - 2027).
